disease_state: Inhibitors of the mitotic kinesin Kif11 are anti-mitotics that, unlike vinca alkaloids or taxanes, do not disrupt microtubules and are not neurotoxic.
age: Studies were performed on equal numbers of male and female mice, ages 8–20 weeks.
cell_line: We generated ispinesib-resistant versions of two primary human GBM lines (L1 and 120).
strain: We used two strains of mice–wild-type FVB and FVB mice with genetic deletion of the two major brain efflux transporters...
